statdxSupplementalImagesWithoutRadPrimer.role: Severe CCJ distraction injury and alar ligament injury example

radPrimerOnlyClustersRetained.reason: Sagittal T2 medial-to-lateral progression absent from STATdx.
MR progression through skull base/C1-C2 ligaments absent from STATdx.

sourceAttributionRules: Use [RadPrimer], [STATdx], and [Both] tags for source-supported prose.
Do not invent Core Radiology support; no Core source package was present in this bundle.
Use clean human-facing labels in narrative prose and keep RP/SDX IDs in traceability fields.

RadPrimer: Canonical article hierarchy and normal-anatomy backbone.
Bone/joint/ligament overview, biomechanics, lateral/frontal assessment scaffolding.
RadPrimer-only MR sequence clusters: RP-32 through RP-34 and RP-38 through RP-40.
STATdx: Expanded ligament anatomy: superficial anterior atlantooccipital ligament, ALL continuity, ligamentum nuchae, myodural bridges, supradental space.
Expanded adult and pediatric measurement thresholds: BDI, AOI, ADI, Powers ratio, BAI, Boogaard angle, Klaus height index, Harris ring, Rule of Spence.
Subtle CCJ ligamentous injury signs and measurement pitfalls.
Larger-crop visual representatives for true duplicate image pairs and supplemental measurement/injury examples.

downweightOrSkip: Do not use caption similarity alone to archive images.
Do not treat STATdx supplemental injury examples as replacements for RadPrimer normal-anatomy clusters.
Do not split same-source MR progression clusters unless a future manual review documents the split.
sourceSelectionPlan.imageCurationPolicy: Exact duplicates may be archived; near duplicates and conceptual replacements remain selected as recognition reinforcement unless visually identical or unusable.
sourceSelectionPlan.duplicateEvidencePolicy: ExactDuplicate decisions require visual evidence from image_evidence files, same stable source image ID, image hashes, or explicit manual/source confirmation. Caption-only or topic-only similarity is uncertain/nearDuplicate and stays primary.

caseClusterGuardrails.policy: Same-patient, adjacent-slice, follow-up, procedure, comparison-view, and time-lapse clusters are atomic teaching units.
caseClusterGuardrails.splitStatement: No source case cluster was intentionally split; RadPrimer-only clusters RP-32 through RP-34 and RP-38 through RP-40 were retained intact.

generatorInstructions: Use RadPrimer order as the organizing scaffold.
Use STATdx to enrich mechanisms, measurement thresholds, injury signs, and management-relevant interpretation, with explicit source attribution.
When narrative/cards mention images, use clean human-facing labels such as RadPrimer image 32 or STATdx image 10; keep RP/SDX IDs in traceability fields.
Download/use only selectedPrimaryImageIds by default; archiveOptionalImageIds are available only for complete-source audit or duplicate recovery.
